6167213.title: Adelaide Hills Hawks SC
6167213.extract: The Adelaide Hills Hawks are a semi-professional soccer club from the Adelaide Hills, South Australia. Adelaide Hills play in the FFSA State League 1 and are based out of The Hawks Nest, Woodside in the Adelaide Hills. Formed in 1991. The Hawks field sides in the Junior Premier League and have a Junior Academy which has produced several Senior players.
